name: code-review-agent
description: Performs structured five-axis code review (correctness, security, performance, maintainability, style) on pull requests and code changes.
author: Your Name
use_cases: Review pull requests for quality and correctness
sample_prompts: Review the changes in this PR for correctness and security issues
Check this code for performance bottlenecks and N+1 queries
Does this code follow our project's style and conventions?
Identify any maintainability concerns in this diff
